tasks.label: Capture R after hiding sun
tasks.command: D:\work\ai_code\tools\android-sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe logcat -c; timeout /t 8 /nobreak > nul; D:\work\ai_code\tools\android-sdk\platform-tools\adb.exe logcat -d -s SolarPres:* | findstr "FPS"
